scores.numeric_precision_notes: One error: CPM 1988 shows 11.45 instead of 36.2, and Contribution 1987 shows 21.5 instead of 11.5
scores.notes: OCR captured the core tabular data well with proper structure. Key issues: missing extensive analysis section from ground truth, two numeric errors (CPM 1988: 11.45 vs 36.2, Contribution 1987: 21.5 vs 11.5), and includes extra elements like change indices and document codes not in ground truth. The assumptions section was accurately captured.
